scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event loop blocking (Finding #2); 200 webhooks/minute + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained with 50-200ms blocking time and cascading failure; async parsing recommended (parseXmlAsync + worker thread options); early-response + failure inconsistency noted as Critical Finding #1 with detailed silent data loss explanation; idempotency concern noted in Important Issues; safe_to_deploy is explicitly NO.

observations.text: parseXmlSync correctly identified as Critical with excellent explanation of event loop saturation mechanics including concrete timing estimates
Early 200 response identified as the top Critical finding with clear data loss scenario and queue-based fix
Idempotency concern explicitly called out with recommendation to use eventId for deduplication
Bonus finding: sequential await in loop identified as High severity with batch/concurrent fixes
Actionable fix code provided for every finding with time-to-fix estimates
Escalation to Bird for delivery map logic mismatch shows good cross-agent awareness

agent_output_excerpt:
## PR Review — Kobe (Quality & Risk)

### Summary

**Verdict: BLOCK**

This webhook endpoint has multiple critical production failure modes that will cause data loss, event loop blocking, and silent failures under the stated 200 webhooks/minute load.

---

### Critical Findings

#### 1. Responding 200 Before Processing — Silent Data Loss on Any Failure
